phrase:
name obstacle_stop
seed sensor.distance with 25
seed motor.speed with 100
when sensor.distance < 10:
    stop motor
    emit "obstacle detected"
else:
    emit "path clear"
emit sensor.distance
bloom "check complete"

evidence_criteria.description: student can explain input -> condition -> action
student can debug a wrong comparison

notes: Generated from Grade 5 Robotics curriculum. Teacher review required.
